[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000011 2
1 0100010 2
2 0001111 4
3 0000000 a
4 0001110 3
5 1100101 4
6 1111100 5
7 0110101 4

01 10 0000100 1
12 21 1100100 3
23 32 0110100 3
34 43 0010000 1
45 54 0000000 a match 3
56 65 0000010 1
67 76 0000010 1
70 07 0001110 3 match 4

02 20 0001100 2
13 31 0100101 3
24 42 1011000 3
35 53 0000001 1
46 64 0000000 a match 3
57 75 0000011 2 match 0
60 06 0000010 1
71 17 0000101 2

47 74 0001000 1
